message:
fix(undo): use or_else() instead of or() to avoid eager cloning

Replace .or(x.clone()) with .or_else(|| x.clone()) in UndoExecutor
to defer the clone until actually needed. The eager .or() variant
clones on every call even when the Option is already Some, which is
both wasteful and triggers a Clippy warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
